interface.longDescription:
Search, compare, and book train, bus, flight, and ferry tickets across 46 countries in Europe, North America, South America, and Asia. Access real-time prices and schedules from 2,300+ transport providers.

Major operators include:
- Trains: Amtrak, Deutsche Bahn, SNCF, Trenitalia, Renfe, Eurostar, ÖBB, Italo
- Buses: FlixBus, National Express, Greyhound, ALSA, Eurolines
- Flights: Major airlines including Ryanair, EasyJet, Lufthansa, American Airlines
- Ferries: Balearia, Fast Ferries, GNV, and more

Book tickets directly with instant mobile delivery. Compare journey times, prices, and connection options. Use when travelers need to find routes between cities, compare transport options across modes, or book intercity and international travel. All options unified in one search.
defaultPrompt: I need to go from Paris to London tomorrow, find train
